ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Release year of the game */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer of the game */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the game */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's cover image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the game's trailer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the game */,
  "is_digital" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is available digitally */,
  "is_physical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is available physically */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES game_developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES game_publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the developer */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the developer was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the developer's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the publisher */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the publisher's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-10) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified user */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "spoiler_tag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the user */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is an admin */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is banned from the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the game to their watchlist */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_game_types" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_game_genres" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "genre_id")
)
